evals.prompt: Audit the current project for SEO gaps and implement a comprehensive Metadata API configuration in the root layout. Include title templates, Open Graph tags, and a default description.
evals.expected_output: The user should see an SEO Audit report followed by a code update to layout.tsx implementing the Next.js Metadata API.

evals.prompt: Automate the generation of a dynamic sitemap and robots.txt for this Vercel project using file-based conventions. Ensure the sitemap excludes the /admin path.
evals.expected_output: Creation of 'app/sitemap.ts' and 'app/robots.ts' with appropriate logic to exclude sensitive paths.

evals.prompt: Implement JSON-LD structured data for an 'Organization' schema on the homepage. Include the logo, social profiles, and contact information.
evals.expected_output: Injection of a <script type='application/ld+json'> tag into the homepage or root layout with valid schema details.
